description.zh: 紧凑轻便的便携式充电器。3.5-11KW。

description.en: Smart home wallbox with APP control and Dynamic Load Balance. 7-22KW EU, 7.5-12KW US Level 2.
description.zh: 智能家用壁挂充电桩，APP控制和动态负载均衡。欧标7-22KW，美标7.5-12KW。

description.en: OCPP-enabled commercial chargers with MID certified meters. Public wallbox, twin, pedestal, and advertising series.
description.zh: 支持OCPP的商用充电桩，MID认证。壁挂、双枪、立柱、广告系列。

description.en: High-power DC fast chargers from 30KW to 720KW. CCS2/CCS1/NACS/GB/T/CHAdeMO.
description.zh: 大功率直流快充，30KW至720KW。兼容全接口标准。

description.en: Integrated energy storage + charging with V2G, solar integration, and smart EMS.
description.zh: 储充一体化，支持V2G、光伏集成和智能能源管理。
